text: UAE Federal Decree-Law No.6 expands CBUAE licensing to virtual asset payment services
UAE firms given one-year reconciliation period until September 2026 to regularise position
UAE Securities and Commodities Authority rebranded as Capital Market Authority from January 2026
CMA issues new guidelines regulating virtual assets and virtual asset service providers in UAE
DFSA updates crypto token regulatory framework effective January 12 2026 including stablecoin treatment
UAE fintech market valued at 52 billion dollars with digital payments holding 57 percent share
SAMA moves open banking from sandbox to formal licensing regime under Vision 2030
Saudi fintech Lean Technologies becomes first licensed open banking provider under SAMA regime
Saudi Arabia open banking framework reaches maturity following supervised sandbox completion in March 2026
DIFC crypto token approval process overhauled with specific fiat stablecoin treatment retained
